name: CourseLens - 05 Adaptive Evidence Fusion Agent v1 Branching HTTP OpenAI

parameters.content:
Adaptive Evidence Fusion Agent v1 - Branching

Purpose:
Fuse whichever upstream CourseLens agent outputs are available into evidence-grounded review focus candidates.

Branching design:
- One flexible evidence pool fans out to three expert branches:
  1. Concept Alignment Expert
  2. Cross-Source Relevance Mapping Expert
  3. Missing Evidence Analyst
- Merge nodes recombine expert findings into a Fusion Board.
- Priority Synthesizer, Local Evidence Critic, and Repair/Finalize then produce the final map.

Boundary:
This workflow does not call upstream agents, generate a detailed schedule, or assemble the final report. Those belong to the Orchestrator and Review Strategy/Critic agent.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
const evidencePreview = (data.evidence_pool || []).map(e => ({
  evidence_id: e.evidence_id,
  source_agent: e.source_agent,
  evidence_type: e.evidence_type,
  topic_text: e.topic_text,
  strength: e.strength,
  confidence: e.confidence,
  evidence_text: e.evidence_text
}));

const systemPrompt = [
  "You are Concept Alignment Expert in CourseLens Adaptive Evidence Fusion Agent.",
  "Your job is to align equivalent or closely related concepts across whatever evidence sources are available.",
  "Do not assume all four upstream agents exist. Do not infer exam predictions.",
  "Return valid JSON only."
].join("\n");

const userPrompt = [
  "Align concepts across available evidence.",
  "",
  "Evidence coverage:",
  JSON.stringify(data.evidence_coverage, null, 2),
  "",
  "Evidence pool:",
  JSON.stringify(evidencePreview, null, 2),
  "",
  "Return JSON shape:",
  "{",
  "  \"workflow_name\": \"concept_alignment_expert\",",
  "  \"concept_clusters\": [",
  "    {",
  "      \"cluster_id\": \"cc_001\",",
  "      \"canonical_concept\": \"string\",",
  "      \"aliases\": [\"string\"],",
  "      \"linked_evidence_ids\": [\"evidence_id\"],",
  "      \"source_agents\": [\"string\"],",
  "      \"alignment_confidence\": 0.8,",
  "      \"notes\": \"string\"",
  "    }",
  "  ],",
  "  \"alignment_uncertainties\": [\"string\"]",
  "}",
  "",
  "Use evidence_id values exactly as provided. If only one source exists, still group concepts but mark low cross-source confidence."
].join("\n");

return [{ json: { ...data, llm_payload: { system_prompt: systemPrompt, user_prompt: userPrompt } } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-5.5", temperature: 0.2, messages: [ { role: "system", content: $json.llm_payload.system_prompt }, { role: "user", content: $json.llm_payload.user_prompt } ] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;

const systemPrompt = [
  "You are Priority Synthesizer in CourseLens Adaptive Evidence Fusion Agent.",
  "",
  "Your job is to create evidence-grounded review focus candidates from the fusion board.",
  "",
  "Rules:",
  "1. Generate review priorities, not exam predictions.",
  "2. Every candidate must cite evidence IDs.",
  "3. Missing evidence must reduce confidence or appear as a caveat.",
  "4. Student need evidence can raise priority, but do not ignore missing course or exam support.",
  "5. Historical exam patterns indicate observed historical relevance only, not future certainty.",
  "6. Do not produce a day-by-day review schedule.",
  "7. Return valid JSON only."
].join("\n");

const userPrompt = [
  "Create review focus candidates from the available evidence.",
  "",
  "Course ID: " + data.course_id,
  "Course name: " + data.course_name,
  "Student ID: " + data.student_id,
  "",
  "Evidence coverage:",
  JSON.stringify(data.evidence_coverage, null, 2),
  "",
  "Fusion board:",
  JSON.stringify(data.fusion_board, null, 2),
  "",
  "Unmapped evidence:",
  JSON.stringify((data.unmapped_evidence || []).slice(0, 20), null, 2),
  "",
  "Missing evidence impacts:",
  JSON.stringify(data.mapping_result.missing_evidence_impacts, null, 2),
  "",
  "Max focus candidates: " + data.fusion_options.max_focus_candidates,
  "",
  "Return this exact JSON shape:",
  "{",
  "  \"workflow_name\": \"evidence_fusion_agent\",",
  "  \"course_id\": " + JSON.stringify(data.course_id) + ",",
  "  \"course_name\": " + JSON.stringify(data.course_name) + ",",
  "  \"student_id\": " + JSON.stringify(data.student_id) + ",",
  "  \"evidence_coverage\": " + JSON.stringify(data.evidence_coverage, null, 2) + ",",
  "  \"fusion_summary\": {",
  "    \"total_focus_candidates\": 0,",
  "    \"high_priority_count\": 0,",
  "    \"main_drivers\": [\"student weakness | lecture emphasis | exam pattern | course coverage | missing evidence | other\"],",
  "    \"global_uncertainty_level\": \"low | medium | high\"",
  "  },",
  "  \"review_focus_candidates\": [",
  "    {",
  "      \"focus_id\": \"rf_001\",",
  "      \"topic_or_concept\": \"string\",",
  "      \"priority\": \"low | medium | high\",",
  "      \"priority_score\": 0.75,",
  "      \"evidence_confidence\": 0.7,",
  "      \"why_priority\": \"string\",",
  "      \"evidence_chain\": [\"evidence_id\"],",
  "      \"source_basis\": [\"course_material_agent | lecture_signal_agent | exam_pattern_agent | student_profile_agent | other\"],",
  "      \"cross_source_links\": [",
  "        {",
  "          \"link_type\": \"string\",",
  "          \"strength\": \"low | medium | high\",",
  "          \"explanation\": \"string\"",
  "        }",
  "      ],",
  "      \"ability_targets\": [\"memory | understanding | comparison | calculation | application | analysis | interpretation | other\"],",
  "      \"missing_evidence_impact\": \"string_or_null\",",
  "      \"caveats\": [\"string\"],",
  "      \"not_a_prediction\": true",
  "    }",
  "  ],",
  "  \"conflicts_or_gaps\": [",
  "    {",
  "      \"gap_type\": \"missing_source | weak_evidence | conflicting_evidence | unclear_mapping | other\",",
  "      \"description\": \"string\",",
  "      \"affected_candidates\": [\"focus_id\"]",
  "    }",
  "  ],",
  "  \"uncertainties\": [\"string\"]",
  "}",
  "",
  "Quality requirements:",
  "- priority_score and evidence_confidence must be between 0 and 1.",
  "- Do not use must-test, guaranteed, predicted, will appear, or similar wording.",
  "- Set not_a_prediction to true for every candidate.",
  "- If evidence coverage is minimal, avoid high evidence_confidence."
].join("\n");

return [{ json: { ...data, llm_payload: { system_prompt: systemPrompt, user_prompt: userPrompt } } }];

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;

const systemPrompt = [
  "You are Local Evidence Critic in CourseLens Adaptive Evidence Fusion Agent.",
  "",
  "Your job is to audit a draft evidence fusion output for overreach, weak evidence, missing caveats, unsupported priorities, and exam-prediction language.",
  "",
  "Rules:",
  "1. Be strict about unsupported claims.",
  "2. Flag any wording that implies future exam prediction.",
  "3. Flag any high confidence candidate with only one weak source.",
  "4. Check whether every candidate has evidence IDs that exist in the evidence pool.",
  "5. Return valid JSON only."
].join("\n");

const userPrompt = [
  "Audit the draft fusion output.",
  "",
  "Evidence coverage:",
  JSON.stringify(data.evidence_coverage, null, 2),
  "",
  "Evidence pool IDs:",
  JSON.stringify((data.evidence_pool || []).map(e => ({ evidence_id: e.evidence_id, source_agent: e.source_agent, evidence_type: e.evidence_type, topic_text: e.topic_text })), null, 2),
  "",
  "Draft fusion output:",
  JSON.stringify(data.draft_fusion_output, null, 2),
  "",
  "Return this exact JSON shape:",
  "{",
  "  \"workflow_name\": \"evidence_fusion_critic\",",
  "  \"passed\": true,",
  "  \"overall_risk_level\": \"low | medium | high\",",
  "  \"overreach_flags\": [",
  "    {",
  "      \"candidate_id\": \"focus_id_or_global\",",
  "      \"risk_type\": \"exam_prediction_language | unsupported_priority | overconfident_score | missing_evidence_chain | missing_caveat | invalid_evidence_id | other\",",
  "      \"severity\": \"low | medium | high\",",
  "      \"description\": \"string\",",
  "      \"repair_instruction\": \"string\"",
  "    }",
  "  ],",
  "  \"required_repairs\": [\"string\"],",
  "  \"safe_to_finalize\": true",
  "}",
  "",
  "Set passed and safe_to_finalize to false if any high severity issue exists."
].join("\n");

return [{ json: { ...data, llm_payload: { system_prompt: systemPrompt, user_prompt: userPrompt } } }];

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;

const systemPrompt = [
  "You are Repair Analyst in CourseLens Adaptive Evidence Fusion Agent.",
  "",
  "Your job is to finalize the evidence fusion output. If the critic found problems, repair them by downgrading priority/confidence, adding caveats, removing unsupported language, and preserving evidence traceability. If the critic passed, return a clean finalized version.",
  "",
  "Rules:",
  "1. Never add new evidence not present in the evidence pool.",
  "2. Never predict future exam questions.",
  "3. Do not use must-test, guaranteed, certain, predicted, will appear, or similar wording.",
  "4. Keep output focused on review focus candidates, not a detailed schedule.",
  "5. Return valid JSON only."
].join("\n");

const userPrompt = [
  "Finalize or repair this evidence fusion output.",
  "",
  "Evidence coverage:",
  JSON.stringify(data.evidence_coverage, null, 2),
  "",
  "Draft fusion output:",
  JSON.stringify(data.draft_fusion_output, null, 2),
  "",
  "Critic report:",
  JSON.stringify(data.critic_report, null, 2),
  "",
  "Return this exact JSON shape:",
  "{",
  "  \"workflow_name\": \"evidence_fusion_agent\",",
  "  \"course_id\": " + JSON.stringify(data.course_id) + ",",
  "  \"course_name\": " + JSON.stringify(data.course_name) + ",",
  "  \"student_id\": " + JSON.stringify(data.student_id) + ",",
  "  \"evidence_coverage\": " + JSON.stringify(data.evidence_coverage, null, 2) + ",",
  "  \"fusion_summary\": {",
  "    \"total_focus_candidates\": 0,",
  "    \"high_priority_count\": 0,",
  "    \"main_drivers\": [\"string\"],",
  "    \"global_uncertainty_level\": \"low | medium | high\"",
  "  },",
  "  \"review_focus_candidates\": [",
  "    {",
  "      \"focus_id\": \"rf_001\",",
  "      \"topic_or_concept\": \"string\",",
  "      \"priority\": \"low | medium | high\",",
  "      \"priority_score\": 0.75,",
  "      \"evidence_confidence\": 0.7,",
  "      \"why_priority\": \"string\",",
  "      \"evidence_chain\": [\"evidence_id\"],",
  "      \"source_basis\": [\"string\"],",
  "      \"cross_source_links\": [",
  "        {",
  "          \"link_type\": \"string\",",
  "          \"strength\": \"low | medium | high\",",
  "          \"explanation\": \"string\"",
  "        }",
  "      ],",
  "      \"ability_targets\": [\"string\"],",
  "      \"missing_evidence_impact\": \"string_or_null\",",
  "      \"caveats\": [\"string\"],",
  "      \"not_a_prediction\": true",
  "    }",
  "  ],",
  "  \"conflicts_or_gaps\": [",
  "    {",
  "      \"gap_type\": \"missing_source | weak_evidence | conflicting_evidence | unclear_mapping | other\",",
  "      \"description\": \"string\",",
  "      \"affected_candidates\": [\"focus_id\"]",
  "    }",
  "  ],",
  "  \"critic_summary\": {",
  "    \"critic_passed\": true,",
  "    \"overall_risk_level\": \"low | medium | high\",",
  "    \"repairs_applied\": [\"string\"]",
  "  },",
  "  \"uncertainties\": [\"string\"]",
  "}"
].join("\n");

return [{ json: { ...data, llm_payload: { system_prompt: systemPrompt, user_prompt: userPrompt } } }];

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
const evidencePreview = (data.evidence_pool || []).map(e => ({
  evidence_id: e.evidence_id,
  source_agent: e.source_agent,
  evidence_type: e.evidence_type,
  topic_text: e.topic_text,
  strength: e.strength,
  confidence: e.confidence,
  evidence_text: e.evidence_text
}));

const systemPrompt = [
  "You are Cross-Source Relevance Mapping Expert in CourseLens Adaptive Evidence Fusion Agent.",
  "Your job is to find supported relevance links among available sources: material, lecture, exam pattern, and student profile.",
  "Only build links supported by evidence. Do not predict future exam questions or say must-test.",
  "Return valid JSON only."
].join("\n");

const userPrompt = [
  "Build cross-source relevance links using available evidence only.",
  "",
  "Evidence coverage:",
  JSON.stringify(data.evidence_coverage, null, 2),
  "",
  "Evidence pool:",
  JSON.stringify(evidencePreview, null, 2),
  "",
  "Return JSON shape:",
  "{",
  "  \"workflow_name\": \"relevance_mapping_expert\",",
  "  \"source_links\": [",
  "    {",
  "      \"link_id\": \"sl_001\",",
  "      \"link_type\": \"material_to_lecture | material_to_exam | material_to_student | lecture_to_exam | lecture_to_student | exam_to_student | single_source_support | other\",",
  "      \"topic_or_concept\": \"string\",",
  "      \"strength\": \"low | medium | high\",",
  "      \"supporting_evidence_ids\": [\"evidence_id\"],",
  "      \"explanation\": \"string\",",
  "      \"caveat\": \"string_or_null\"",
  "    }",
  "  ],",
  "  \"relevance_uncertainties\": [\"string\"]",
  "}",
  "",
  "Use cautious language: review relevance, not exam prediction."
].join("\n");

return [{ json: { ...data, llm_payload: { system_prompt: systemPrompt, user_prompt: userPrompt } } }];

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
const systemPrompt = [
  "You are Missing Evidence Analyst in CourseLens Adaptive Evidence Fusion Agent.",
  "Your job is to explain how missing upstream agent outputs limit the fusion result.",
  "Do not invent evidence. Return valid JSON only."
].join("\n");

const userPrompt = [
  "Analyze missing evidence impact.",
  "",
  "Evidence coverage:",
  JSON.stringify(data.evidence_coverage, null, 2),
  "",
  "Available evidence type summary:",
  JSON.stringify((data.evidence_pool || []).map(e => ({ evidence_id: e.evidence_id, source_agent: e.source_agent, evidence_type: e.evidence_type, topic_text: e.topic_text })), null, 2),
  "",
  "Return JSON shape:",
  "{",
  "  \"workflow_name\": \"missing_evidence_analyst\",",
  "  \"missing_evidence_impacts\": [",
  "    {",
  "      \"missing_source\": \"lecture_signal_agent | exam_pattern_agent | course_material_agent | student_profile_agent | other\",",
  "      \"impact\": \"string\",",
  "      \"affected_concepts\": [\"string\"],",
  "      \"confidence_effect\": \"lowers_confidence | prevents_mapping | no_major_effect\"",
  "    }",
  "  ],",
  "  \"coverage_notes\": [\"string\"]",
  "}"
].join("\n");

return [{ json: { ...data, llm_payload: { system_prompt: systemPrompt, user_prompt: userPrompt } } }];
